CustomField.description: Populated by rollup helper on the Account. Shows the future date of an event scheduled with an Onboarding Specialist.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shows the future date of an event scheduled with an Onboarding Specialist. Does not include future Webinars, just 1:1 calls (ie. events/meetings that are scheduled with a Contact that is directly related to the Account that the CF is associated with)
CustomField.label: Next Onboarding Meeting Scheduled
